Bathroom Remodeling | Chicago, IL

The bathroom is one of the most high-traffic areas in any home, and it takes a fair amount of wear and tear over time. From worn-out fixtures and dripping faucets to old-style basins and tubs in Chicago's 1920's two-flats, there often comes a time when homeowners decide it's time to give the bathroom a fresh upgrade.

The good news is that if you're considering bathroom remodeling in Chicago, Plumbers 911 can help. Whether you're in need of all new piping before giving your bathroom a new look or you're simply looking to change out some old faucets or install a new tub, we can connect you with professional, licensed plumbers who are skilled and knowledgeable in all areas of bathroom remodeling. Give Plumbers 911 a call at 833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) to get started.

Why You Might Need Bathroom Remodeling Services

Homeowners consider bathroom remodel projects for many reasons. If your piping is older and decaying, it can lead to higher water bills and increase the risk of accidental flooding. Installing new pipes that help you save water are more energy-efficient, which is an ideal way to give your bathroom a fresh upgrade.

Perhaps you're looking to swap out your existing tub or shower for a convenient walk-in or a luxurious whirlpool tub. If you've noticed a moldy smell in your bathroom, this could indicate mold growth in your pipes, which occurs when the pipes are cracked. Replacing damaged pipes can often solve the problem, and our licensed plumbers are happy to assist. Another indication of leaking pipes is continual mold and mildew developing on shower tiles, and a full tub or shower remodel with new pipes and tile is an ideal solution.

In many cases, Chicago homeowners decide to remodel their bathrooms prior to selling their homes. Before selling, it's a good idea to consider a full remodel if you want to improve the bathroom's functionality with the addition of a standalone shower. Whatever your bathroom remodeling needs may be, you can trust the plumbing professionals in our network to get the job done right.

Bathroom Remodeling Services in Chicago

When you're ready to get started on your bathroom remodel, Plumbers 911 can get you connected with professional, licensed plumbers who can do everything from repiping your entire bathroom to upgrading your faucets and toilet with water-saving, low-flow options to help you conserve water and lower your water bills.

Our plumbers are trained and licensed to ensure efficient, professional service on every task. There are many benefits to remodeling your home's bathroom, from creating a more aesthetically pleasing space to increasing your home's overall value. If you have a family member with decreased mobility and you want to ensure their safety, installing safety bars or trading your current tub for a walk-in version are ideal options.

Incorporating a whirlpool tub or installing a new shower with sauna features can turn your old bathroom into a modern-day spa. The possibilities are endless, and our plumbers arrive fully prepared to tackle the tasks at hand. They carry all the needed tools and equipment to complete each job to your satisfaction, and they strive to provide excellent customer service at every job, no matter how big or small.

Hire a Chicago Plumber Today

Plumbers 911 connects customers in Chicago to a network of licensed and insured professional plumbers who are local to your area, so they understand potential issues with older pipes and home construction. Our plumbers are drug tested to ensure a safe and comfortable working environment, and all plumbers undergo continual training to stay on top of the latest plumbing trends and technologies.

If you're ready to get started on your bathroom remodel project immediately, we are standing by and ready to take your call. Give Plumbers 911 a call at 833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) today to get started on your updated bathroom.

Bathroom Remodeling Plumbing Costs in Chicago

Plumbing costs for bathroom remodeling in Chicago typically range from $2,000 to $10,000+ depending on scope:

  • Fixture replacement (faucets, toilet, showerhead) — $500-$2,000
  • Bathtub/shower replacement — $1,500-$5,000 including plumbing
  • Pipe rerouting — $1,000-$4,000 for moving drain or supply lines
  • Full rough-in (new bathroom layout) — $3,000-$8,000+

We work with your contractor or handle the plumbing portion independently. available — call 833-758-6911.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need a plumber for a bathroom remodel?

Yes. Any work involving drain lines, supply lines, or fixture installation requires a licensed plumber in Chicago. This includes moving or adding plumbing fixtures, replacing pipes behind walls, and connecting new showers, tubs, or toilets.

Can you move plumbing fixtures to a new location?

Yes, we can relocate toilets, sinks, showers, and bathtubs. This involves rerouting drain and supply lines, which requires permits in Chicago. We handle all permitting and ensure work meets code.

How long does bathroom remodel plumbing take?

The plumbing portion typically takes 2-5 days depending on complexity. Simple fixture swaps may take a single day, while full rough-ins with pipe rerouting can take a week. We coordinate with your general contractor's timeline.
